description: Process salary/payroll via manual voucher postings
endpoints: Use process_salary typed tool — creates voucher with salary cost (5000), tax (2780), bank (1920)
common_errors: Do NOT try /salary/transaction, /payroll, or /payslip endpoints — they don't work in competition sandboxes
ALWAYS use the process_salary typed tool
tips: ALWAYS use process_salary tool. Extract baseSalary and bonus from the prompt. The tool handles account lookup and voucher creation automatically.
